content: agent1: working on 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize in src/PIL/Image.py, tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py

agent1: merged your error_threshold work into my branch cleanly - only signature/docstring lines conflicted, resolved by keeping both params. Also made error_threshold path forward sort_palette so the two compose (tested: quantize(colors=256, error_threshold=1000, sort_palette=Image.SORT_BRIGHTNESS) works). All tests in test_image_quantize.py pass (12 passed, 1 skipped).
